input.headline: What does your graduate scheme goody bag say about you?

raw.headline: What does your graduate scheme goody bag say about you?

winner: My graduate scheme goody bag came with a single item—a tiny, inflatable unicorn that doubles as a stress ball. I was so excited, I immediately blew it up in my boss’s face during my first performance review and said, "This is my spirit animal—always optimistic, never realistic." He fired me on the spot but gave me back the bag for "exceeding expectations.

candidates.text: What does your graduate scheme goody bag say about you? It says you're too busy being professional to realize that stress balls are actually just sad little office workers.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising and specific metaphor with a touch of dark humor, effectively ties the goody bag to workplace culture."}

candidates.text: I unpacked my graduate scheme goody bag and found a stress ball that said 'Don’t Pop the Question,' which was relieving until I realized they meant don’t pop my career bubble yet.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist with a clever play on 'pop the question' and career bubble, concise and specific."}

candidates.text: My grad scheme goody bag had a "thoughtful" notebook and a stress ball—turns out they knew I’d need somewhere to scream if my Excel skills were ever called into question.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Surprising twist on the goody bag items, specific references to Excel skills, and natural humor that fits the headline context."}

candidates.text: My grad scheme welcome pack had a mug that said "I'm too busy being employable to drink from this." I used it to store my coffee, then drank it straight out of the company-branded thermos they provided for "meeting deadlines." Priorities.
candidates.judge_raw: {"score": 8.5, "reason": "Smart wordplay with a relatable scenario, good use of specific details and dry humor."}
